name: Squat Specialization
description: Jeff Nippard's Squat Specialization Program - 10 weeks, 3 blocks (Volume Accumulation, Deload, Peaking + Testing)

phases.name: Block 1: Volume Accumulation Phase
phases.description: Weeks 1-4, 4 lower body days per week focusing on squat volume accumulation with progressive overload

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Sit down, keep your hips open

exercises.name: Seated Good Morning
exercises.notes: Keep your lumbar and thoracic spine neutral

exercises.name: Snatch Grip Deadlift
exercises.notes: Keep your lumbar spine neutral

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your quads to move the weight

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.notes: Keep your glutes locked out throughout the ROM

exercises.name: Pause Squat
exercises.notes: Full 2-second pause. Explode during the concentric

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Keep your rib cage and chin tucked down. Use a pad

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Elevate your rear foot

exercises.name: Seated Hip Abduction Machine
exercises.notes: Focus on using a full ROM

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way onto your toes, don't bounce

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Sit down, keep your hips open

exercises.name: Reverse Hyperextension
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your glutes to move your legs

exercises.name: Knee-Banded Barbell Box Squat
exercises.notes: Set box to parallel. Sit back, keep your knees out

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.notes: Focus on flexing your lumbar spine

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.notes: Maintain a hyperextended thoracic and lumbar spine

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Keep your rib cage and chin tucked down. Use a pad

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Don't allow your lumbar spine to round

exercises.notes: Focus on using a full ROM

phases.name: Deload Week
phases.description: Week 5, reduced volume deload with 2 lower body days

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.notes: Sit down, keep your hips open

exercises.name: Touch-and-Go Deadlift
exercises.notes: Focus on keeping your lumbar spine neutral

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Focus on squeezing your hamstrings to move the weight

exercises.name: Single-Leg Leg Press
exercises.notes: Don't allow your lumbar spine to round

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.notes: Keep your glutes locked out throughout the ROM

exercises.name: Pause Squat
exercises.notes: Full 2-second pause. Explode during the concentric

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Keep your rib cage and chin tucked down. Use a pad

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Elevate your rear foot

exercises.name: Seated Hip Abduction Machine
exercises.notes: Focus on using a full ROM

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.notes: Press all the way onto your toes, don't bounce

phases.name: Block 2: Peaking Phase
phases.description: Weeks 6-10, reduced to 2 lower body days per week with increasing intensity and reduced volume, culminating in a testing week
